properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 32/18
NORWEGIAN SEA
SCIENTIFIC ROCKET LAUNCHING
TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER IN THE PERIOD FROM APRIL 8TH TO APRIL 20TH 2018. THE LAUNCHES WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0800-2400 LOCAL TIME, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA

HAZARD AREA
AN AREA DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES 

A. 69-56.0N - 014-10.0E
B. 69-22.0N - 014-56.0E
C. 69-36.0N - 016-19.0E
D. 70-09.0N - 015-38.0E
E. 69-56.0N - 014-10.0E

PUBLISHED IN NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS NO6 2018.
